book.enigmatic_legacy.landing_text: The vast lands lie ahead of you, full of secrets and mysteries to uncover.
message.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring.no_a: You need the Ring of Ender to do that.
message.enigmatic_legacy.magnet_ring.no_: You are not wearing a Magnetic Ring or Dislocation Ring.
quote.another_demigod_1: Another demigod wanders this forsaken land...
quote.another_demigod_2: Let me accompany you in your journey. Perhaps, you will manage that which others could not.
quote.another_eon_1: Another eon, another wanderer.\nAnother story to be told...
quote.another_eon_2: I will observe yours with great curiosity.
quote.appaling_presence_1: The shell is gone... but appalling presence will forever remain imprinted upon this realm.
quote.breathes_relieved_1: The world breathes relieved without the burdensome presence of that horror...
quote.countless_dead_1: Countless dead souls, merged into abomination of such terrible form that it defies description.
quote.countless_dead_2: The earth is stained by the very presence of this foul creature.
quote.death_may_1: Death may impede your conquest, but only broken will can halt it.
quote.demise_is_1: Demise is but a temporary inconvenience for a demigod such as you.
quote.end_doorstep_1: The doorstep of The End...\nsingle step now separates you from it.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.dee: Beneath the stone, old things still remember your steps.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.fir: An empty sky. A dead kingdom. How familiar.
This place burns, yet it is not the deepest wound.
At last, sight returns to the blind.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.low: You are closer to silence than you think.
quote.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.mid: The world is quiet now. Listen carefully.
quote.eternity_to_keep_1: You have eternity to keep trying. Do what it takes.
quote.horrible_existence_1: What a horrible existence...\nBrought back from the dead, only to be slain once more.
quote.horrible_existence_2: You must truly be devoid of compassion.
quote.i_wandered_1: Yes, I wandered those lands many times...
quote.i_wandered_2: A desolate reminder of everything that was, and all that could have been.
quote.immortal_1: You are immortal! Return and give that pitiful creature a demonstration of this fact.
quote.its_destruction_1: Its destruction is a small consolation...\ngiven the implications of its terrible existence.
quote.no_peril_1: Where there is no peril in the task - there can be no glory in its accomplishment.
quote.oblivion_rejects_1: Oblivion rejects you...\nmake use of such opportunity, while you still can.
quote.only_because_1: Only because you have fallen does not yet mean you backed down.
quote.perhaps_you_1: Perhaps, you will be the one to uncover the long-forgotten history of this land...
quote.perhaps_you_2: If so, I must bear witness to your accomplishments.
quote.poor_creature_1: Poor creature...\nThe last of her kind, bound to guard the godforsaken island...
quote.poor_creature_2: ...in the middle of nothingness. Lay her to the deserved rest.
quote.setback_1: A setback, but not a defeat.
quote.sulfur_air_1: Sulfur in the air, sharp scent of burnt rock and flesh...
quote.sulfur_air_2: This place is a Hell indeed.
quote.terrifying_form_1: ...its terrifying form is destructible, but not its soul.
quote.terrifying_form_2: It bears curse not dissimilar to yours...\nCurse of immortality.
quote.toll_paid_1: With the toll paid, you are free from the burdensome swell of hatred and sorrow...
quote.tortured_rocks_1: Tortured rocks, pale as bones, hanged up above infinite, all-consuming blackness.
quote.tortured_rocks_2: The End...\nis almost like a fever dream.
quote.violence_calls_1: Violence calls for vengeance.\nReturn, and dispense it!
quote.we_fall_1: We fall, so that we may learn how to pick ourselves back up.
quote.whether_it_is_1: Whether it is power, or redemption that you seek in repeatedly returning Wither from and to its grave...
quote.whether_it_is_2: ...at least, you give that damnable creature a purpose.
quote.with_dragons_1: With dragon's imminent demise, this place seems even more empty and purposeless than before.
quote.with_dragons_2: Will you wander those fractured, deserted lands...
quote.with_dragons_3: ...or return to the facade of sanity and liveliness the Overworld provides?
quote.with_dragons_4: Of course, we both know the answer...\nyou cannot resist exploring the unknown, be it now or later.
quote.you_will_endure_1: You will endure this loss, and learn from it.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.bloodstained_va: +%s Attack Damage per missing health percent.
+%s Attack Speed per missing health percent.
+%s Movement Speed per missing health percent.
+%s Damage Resistance per missing health percent.
These traits scale with how much health you are missing.
The closer you are to death, the stronger it becomes.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses can use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing11: §dSeven blessings will reward those who withstand:
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing18: §5- You can create and use unique relics.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing3: §dSeven curses will befall whoever bears it:
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing4: §5- You receive double damage from §6ANY§5 source.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing5: §5- Neutral creatures are aggressive towards you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing7: §5- Monsters receive §6%1$s§5 less damage from you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing8: §5- When on fire, you burn forever.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRing9: §5- Every death tears your soul apart.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore1: §5Once forged by antediluvian god, it beckons
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore2: §5mortals and higher beings alike with promise
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore4: §5Be it arrogance or ignorance that leads them
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore5: §5to believe they can harness ring's power,
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursedRingLore6: §5both are paid for in suffering the extent of
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.cursed_ones_onl: Only those bearing the curse may comprehend its purpose.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.dislocation_rin: Instantly collects nearby items within %s blocks.
Cannot be worn together with a Magnetic Ring.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enchanter_pearl: Allows the bearer to carry more magical trinkets.
The extra slot exists only while this pearl is equipped.
Only bearers of the Seven Curses can use this item.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring1: Allows access to your Ender Chest while equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.ender_ring2: Press the keybind or use the inventory button.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_amule: A relic marked by an unknown force.
Only one amulet may answer your call.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.a: Increases block interaction range by 3 blocks.
The Eye has awakened, and now it sees.
Only the awakened Eye can be equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.enigmatic_eye.d: Some things are better left unseen.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eternallyBound1: §5Once worn, it becomes a part of you.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.eternallyBound2: §4This ring will persist with you forever.
§6With the power of god, you can unequip it.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.evilEssence1: Embodies raw, unrefined energy torn out
This piglin-neutralizing effect fails for bearers of the Seven Curses.
Piglins regard the wearer as one bearing gold.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.forbidden_fruit: After eating it, you will no longer
feel hunger, but any form of
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.golem_heart.7: Immune to crushing and piercing environmental damage.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.golem_heart.8: Magic damage taken is multiplied by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.guardian_heart1: While in your hotbar, looking at a monster within %s blocks turns it against nearby monsters.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.guardian_heart2: Nearby monsters within %s blocks will retaliate against the marked creature.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.mega_sponge.1: Automatically absorbs nearby water while equipped.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.monster_charm.1: Increases damage dealt to undead enemies by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.monster_charm.2: Increases damage dealt to hostile creatures by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.soulCrystal1: Right-Click to absorb the crystal and
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.soulCrystal2: restore one of your lost Soul Crystals.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.storageCrystal1: Contains items and experience lost on death.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.the_acknowledgm: The Fourth Curse is weakened by %s.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_heart.a: Activated by the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_mirror1: Returns you to your spawn point.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.twisted_mirror3: Requires the Ring of the Seven Curses.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unholy_grail1: Drink from it to draw upon forbidden power.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unholy_grail2: The unworthy will suffer for their arrogance.
tooltip.enigmatic_legacy.unwitnessed_amu: An amulet without witness, name, or fate.
It waits to be claimed by a mortal soul.
Right-click to reveal its true color.
